projectDescription: An open source events platform for communities and organizations to manage groups, events, speaker programs, and member engagement in one place.
keyFeatures: Multi-community and multi-group management with dedicated dashboards
Full event lifecycle: in-person, virtual, and hybrid events
Call for Speakers with proposal submission and session review workflow
QR code check-in and attendance tracking
Zoom integration with automatic meeting setup
Interactive map and calendar views for event/group discovery
Role-based access with community, group, and user dashboard scopes
Automated email notifications with calendar attachments
Analytics dashboards with charts and metrics per community/group
GitHub and Linux Foundation SSO login options
publicApiSurface: GET /dashboard/user — user profile, events, proposals, submissions
GET /dashboard/community — community settings, regions, categories, analytics, groups
GET /dashboard/group — group management, events, members, sponsors, notifications
QR check-in endpoint for event attendance
